basic_details.job_title: BDL Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 20 Posts
basic_details.job_type: Temporary / Contract (initially 1 year, extendable up to 4 years)
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) has released the BDL Recruitment 2026 Notification (Advt No. BDL/C-HR (TA & CP)/2026-1) on 27th May 2026 at the official website bdl-india.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced for the post of Project Engineer across Electronics (10 posts), Mechanical (5 posts), and Computer Science (5 posts) disciplines. The selection will be through a Walk-in Interview on 6th and 7th June 2026 at The Aeronautical Society of India (AeSI), Bengaluru. The upper age limit is 28 years for UR/EWS candidates as on 07.05.2026. Monthly salary starts at ₹30,000/- in the first ye

application_fee.details: There is no application fee for BDL Project Engineer Walk-in Interview 2026. No TA or DA will be paid to candidates attending the walk-in interview.

qualification.details: The upper age limit for BDL Project Engineer 2026 is reckoned as on 07.05.2026. Age relaxation is available as per Government of India rules. | Candidates must hold a First Class (60%) BE / B.Tech / B.Sc Engg (4 years) / Integrated M.E. / M.Tech in the relevant discipline from an AICTE-approved institution. For SC/ST candidates applying against reserved posts, 55% marks are sufficient. | No rounding off allowed (59.99% is not treated as 60%). Academic / Teaching / Internship / Project Work experience will NOT count as industrial experience. | All posts require a minimum of 1 year of post-qualification industrial experience in the relevant domain. Key areas per discipline:

salary_details.details: BDL Project Engineer salary starts at ₹30,000/- per month in the first year and increases to ₹39,000/- per month by the fourth year, plus an annual allowance of ₹10,000/- for medical, attire, and footwear expenses. | In addition, ₹10,000/- per year is paid in two instalments towards medical insurance premium, attire allowance, stitching charges, and footwear allowance. The contract is initially for 1 year, extendable up to a maximum of 4 years based on organisational requirement and individual performance.

selection_process: Selection for BDL Project Engineer 2026 is based on a total of 100 marks across three components. The minimum qualifying marks are 60% (with relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD as per Government rules).
75 Academic Marks - (1 mark per % of degree
max 75) 10 Post-Qualification Experience (1yr=3 pts · 2yr=6 pts · 3yr+=10 pts) 15 Walk-in Interview Performance
how_to_apply: BDL Project Engineer 2026 is a Walk-in Interview - there is no online application form. Candidates must appear directly at the venue with all required documents. Follow these steps:
Download the official BDL Recruitment 2026 notification PDF from bdl-india.in → HR section.
Download and print the Bio-data Form (Annexure-I) attached to the notification.
Fill the Bio-data Form in capital letters, affix a recent passport-size colour photograph, and self-attest all required documents.
